title: The Garden Dream
content: Helped someone plan their retirement last year. She thought she wanted to travel the world. After we really dug into it? She wanted a garden. A GARDEN. And grandkid time. And morning coffee on her own schedule. Sometimes the big dream is actually a collection of small, beautiful moments. We built a plan around THAT.
extended_content: She came in saying 'I want to see the world.' Which is a fine goal! But when we talked about what retirement really meant to her... it wasn't about big trips. It was about time. Time to garden. Time to read without interruption. Time to pick up grandkids from school on random Tuesdays. Time for her OWN schedule. The travel? That was what she thought retirement was supposed to look like. The garden? That was what she actually wanted.
lesson: What you think you want and what you actually want are often different
